title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 26 June 2026

section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 26 June 2026
summary:
Main
Market sentiment in India has weakened, with local ship recycling prices correcting across all segments in line with softer domestic fundamentals. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
Market sentiment in India has weakened, with local ship recycling prices correcting
across all segments in line with softer domestic fundamentals. Most recyclers continue to acquire tonnage despite operating at unprofitable levels,
primarily to maintain business continuity and keep yard operations running.
